## Summary

Fixed 4 production issues in `agents/skills/watch-pr.md`:

| # | Issue | Location | Action |
|---|-------|----------|--------|
| 1 | Dismiss API used POST instead of PUT + invalid `event` param | `:77` | tidy |
| 2 | Thread resolution claimed line-level but only has file-level tooling | `:58, :109` | docs |
| 3 | No error handling for failed GraphQL/REST mutations | `:70, :80` | docs |
| 4 | Bot detection `*-bot` pattern too loose — could dismiss human reviews | `:80` | tidy |

All 532 tests pass. Commit `02f9f1f`.
